name: see-it-through
description: Checkpoint-driven durable task loops for Codex and Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Keep long agent tasks alive until every checkpoint is done
interface.longDescription: See It Through gives Codex and Claude Code a shared durable-task packet, checkpoint cursor, Codex heartbeat scaffolding, and Claude hook scaffolding so long tasks can keep moving until the plan is actually complete.
defaultPrompt: Use autopilot for this task and keep going until every checkpoint is done.
Plan this carefully, persist the checkpoints, and keep resuming until completion.
Turn this into a Claude or Codex managed task.
